Carry DPS Analysis: High DPS: Pure single-target focus with no AoE, splash, or CC utility. Job is strictly melting a single frontliner. Wound bonus (+30%) triggers on subsequent casts. 0.5s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Wound Amplification: Firing at a Wounded target increases Twin Fang's damage from 160 to 208 (+30%), maintaining her baseline at 68.6 Total DPS.
Moderate DPS: Low single-target DPS due to long 1.6s channel lockout, but deals massive multi-target line-pierce damage hitting 2-4 targets with 56% damage falloff per hit.
Linear Pierce: Hitting an average of 2 targets in combat increases total spell damage from 461.5 to 664.6, scaling Total DPS to 70.1 DPS.
Moderate DPS: Lower single-target DPS to balance his AoE portals and high-value 50% shield-break utility. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Shield Destruction & AoE: Instantly destroys 50% of active shields. Hitting an average of 1.5 targets scales Total DPS to 66.8 DPS.
Moderate/Low DPS: Lower single-target DPS because she is a utility-shredder, reducing target armor by 10/15/20 for the rest of combat. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Armor Shred: Reduces target armor by 10/15/20. Increases all physical damage to target, boosting effective team DPS by ~15-20%.
Low DPS: Lowest base single-target DPS because her active steroid grants 60% AD splash damage in adjacent hexes, multiplying in grouped combat. 4.0s active duration locks mana gain.
AD Splash: Hitting an average of 1 adjacent target with active steroid splash scales Total DPS to 53.8 DPS.
High DPS: High single-target DPS due to scaling melee stacking damage (+20/30/45 AP per cast) that has no utility. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Sustain Stacking: Stacks +20/30/45 AP per cast. After 2 casts, spell damage increases to 208.8, scaling Total DPS to 68.0 DPS.
High DPS: High DPS because she splits her damage across 5 rockets. Modest cast lockout (1.0s) pauses basic attacks.
Rocket Split: Fires 5 rockets. Splitting damage across multiple targets scales Total DPS to 77.5 DPS across all targets.
Moderate/Low DPS: Lower single-target DPS because his noxious trap is a circular AoE dot that applies anti-heal (Wound) to multiple enemies. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Circular AoE: Detonating noxious trap on an average of 2 targets doubles spell damage, scaling Total DPS to 100.8 DPS.
Moderate base DPS: Moderate base, but scales exponentially to high DPS (+14.0/21.0/31.5 per trigger) when paired with knockup allies. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Knockup Combo: Triggering an average of 2 knockups from Sett/Vi/Poppy throws 2 free boulders, scaling Total DPS to 95.7 DPS.
Moderate DPS: Lower baseline single-target DPS, but scales exponentially with Critical Chance/Damage and lands on multiple adjacent targets (normally lands on 2 targets minimum in melee).
Clone Double-Slash: Zed and clone double-slash target (204 damage). Slashes hitting 2 targets minimum (3 hits total) scales Total DPS to 69.1 DPS.
Moderate DPS: Lower sustain DPS due to long 3.0s channel lockout, but high burst backline target-lock can easily one-shot squishies.
Backline Sniper: Channels 6 shots. Locks farthest target, dealing 570 physical damage in a single cast, which instantly kills a squishy 1★ carry.

Moderate base DPS: Modest single-target base DPS, but scales to extremely high DPS through instant recast execute resets on kills. 1.0s cast lockout pauses basic attacks. Normally chains 2-3 times in teamfights.
Execute Reset Chain: Recasts on kills. Chaining 1 reset (2 casts) on average increases Total DPS to 75.5 DPS. Chaining 2 resets increases it to 85.2 DPS.
High DPS: High DPS due to fast mana cycle (45 max mana), balanced by high-risk melee positioning and 20% self-heal. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Healing EHP: Heals 20% of all damage taken in the last 4 seconds. Under heavy focus, active heal increases his effective health (EHP) by 1.25x.
Moderate base DPS: Moderate single-target base due to long 4s attack lockout, but scales exponentially in grouped combat (360-degree AoE spin hits adjacent hexes).
360-Degree Spin: Spinning on an average of 2 adjacent targets doubles spell output, scaling Total DPS to 99.2 DPS.
Moderate base DPS: Lower baseline, but provides high effective DPS by shredding high-armor/MR tanks with stacking true damage execution. 0.8s active lockout pauses basic attacks.
True Rend Execute: Spear stacks deal true damage (bypassing Armor/MR). Rend execute triggers at exact kill threshold, preventing overkill waste.
High DPS: High DPS because every 3rd cast fires 3 bursts. Deals AoE splash damage. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Empowered Splash: Every 3rd cast fires 3 bursts. Hitting an average of 2 targets with explosions scales Total DPS to 112.3 DPS.
High DPS: High DPS due to 3 teleport slashes (deals 3x spell damage), balanced by high-risk melee positioning. 1.2s sequence lockout pauses basic attacks.
3-Dagger Teleport: Slashes adjacent targets 3 times. Hitting an average of 1.5 targets per teleport (4.5 hits total) scales Total DPS to 88.6 DPS.
Moderate base DPS: Moderate baseline, but deals true damage executes and heals on kills. 0.8s bite lockout pauses basic attacks.
True Damage Execution: Bite deals 294 true damage (bypassing Armor/MR) if target is below 66% health, and heals Rek'Sai for 10% max HP.
Low DPS: Lowest baseline in Tier 3 because his projectile splits in two at right angles, multiplying damage in teamfights. 0.8s cast lockout pauses basic attacks.
Split Projectiles: Projectile splits on first hit. Hitting an average of 1 additional target with split bolts scales Total DPS to 60.9 DPS.
